title: Craftable Nametag
description: Adds a crafting recipe for nametags!
body:
[![Requires Fabric API](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_64h.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
[![Requires Quilted Fabric API](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/requires/quilted-fabric-api_64h.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl)

![Craftable Nametag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e84fbc0815a03116ff167a9b7783413b04ebfb0b.png)

This mod/datapack lets you craft nametags using paper, string, and iron. It's convenient and easily affordable! No need to loot countless chests just to find nametags!

## Recipe
![You can craft a nametag using 1 iron ingot, 2 string, and 4 paper.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a5438400557ce54fd40436f91a2a14e9b8ff155.png)

Check out my other mods [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Sumbaii999).
